name: MARQUEE

domestic: Domestic lounge access up to 6 visits per quarter for primary and add-on cardmembers
Domestic lounge access is subject to a spend threshold of Rs 1,00,000 in the previous calendar quarter.
international: Unlimited international lounge access for primary and add-on cardmembers

exclusions: EMI transactions (including post-purchase and instant EMI)
joiningBenefits: 40,000 YES Rewardz points credited on joining fee realization
renewalBenefits: 20,000 YES Rewardz points credited on renewal fee realization
additionalBenefits: Buy one get one movie benefit on BookMyShow with monthly cap (up to 3 tickets per month, max discount Rs 800 per ticket)
Purchase protection cover on eligible electronics
Green fee waiver and golf lessons at select golf courses

voucherRedemptions.note: 100 YES Rewardz points -> 10 Adani Reward Points

salaried: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to YES BANK approval criteria

internalNotes: YES BANK Marquee card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
Overall reward points capped at 1,00,000 per statement cycle.
Utility rewards are capped at 1,250 points per statement cycle.
